description:
Search for available ConstructionSets within the honeybee energy standards library.
-

outputs.description:
A list of ConstructionSet identifiers that can be applied
to Honeybee Rooms.
outputs.name: constr_sets

inputs.description:
Optional keywords to be used to filter the output list of
construction sets. If nothing is input here, all available
construction sets will be output.
inputs.name: keywords_

inputs.description:
If False or None, this component will automatically split
any strings of multiple keywords (spearated by spaces) into separate
keywords for searching. This results in a greater likelihood of
finding an item in the search but it is not desriable when searching
for a specific sequence of words. (Default: False).
inputs.name: join_words_

name: HB Search Construction Sets
